summary: Completed dense completeness theorem via density argument. Created DovetailedCoverage.lean (491 lines) with has_future/has_past theorems proven using encoding growth and density iteration. Created DovetailedCompleteness.lean (141 lines) wiring to TimelineQuot-based completeness.

artifacts.summary: Coverage lemmas using density argument: encoding_growth_exists, density_iterate_in_mcs, witness_at_large_step, dovetailedTimeline_has_future, dovetailedTimeline_has_past
Dense completeness theorem wiring: dovetailed_dense_completeness using TimelineQuot instances
Implementation summary for phases 4-6 of plan v11

completion_data.completion_summary: Proved dense completeness via full dovetailing. Created DovetailedCoverage.lean with sorry-free has_future/has_past theorems using density argument (F^i formulas with unbounded encodings). Created DovetailedCompleteness.lean wiring to TimelineQuot-based completeness. All Dovetailed files are sorry-free.
